description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named ClusterFuzzLite batch fuzzing that runs every 6 hours and can be manually dispatched. The workflow has read-all permissions and uses a ubuntu-latest job matrix to build and run fuzzers with different sanitizers. For each sanitizer, build fuzzers using google/clusterfuzzlite/actions/build_fuzzers@v1 and then run fuzzers using google/clusterfuzzlite/actions/run_fuzzers@v1 with a GitHub token, fuzzing for 3600 seconds in batch mode, and storing artifacts in a specified Git repository.
